channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup Is 100 Days Out! Here's What to Know
item.description: Here's what you need to know with the World Cup kicking off this summer.

item.title: World Cup Spotlight: Which USA Players Have A Pivotal Next 100 Days?
item.description: Whether its health or performance, three crucial USA players are worth to monitor for the next 100 days.

item.title: Balogun or Pepi? Former USA and Fulham Striker Brian McBride Weighs In
item.description: With the 2026 FIFA World Cup 100 days away, the battle for the United States men's national team's starting striker position is far from settled.

item.title: Which Messi Golazo Kicks Off Our Countdown of Best 100 Men's World Cup Moments?
item.description: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.

item.title: The USA's Top-5 Burning World Cup Questions With 100 Days To Go
item.description: The five biggest questions facing Mauricio Pochettinoâs USA squad with 100 days to go before the World Cup.

item.title: Giannis rusty but 'just happy that I'm out there'
item.description: Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo returned Monday night against the Celtics, his first game in more than five weeks after straining his right calf.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Bruno Fernandes plans Man United future talks
item.description: Bruno Fernandes has shown no signs of wanting to leave Manchester United, while Casemiro has urged the club to sign Bruno GuimarÃ£es. Transfer Talk has...

item.title: Arizona wins Big 12; Lloyd calls out 'soft' narrative
item.description: No. 2 Arizona clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title with a 73-57 win over No. 6 Iowa State on Monday night.

item.title: Trae tossed from bench ahead of Wizards debut
item.description: Trae Young, who is set to make his Wizards debut Thursday vs. Utah, was ejected for leaving the bench in Monday's loss to Houston.

item.title: Boozer, Duke 'show fight' in securing ACC title
item.description: Star freshman Cameron Boozer and top-ranked Duke overwhelmed NC State on Monday night to clinch the outright ACC regular-season title.
